title: Evaluation Override Authorization
description: Governed override authorization artifact for the BU Evaluation Enforcement Bridge. Overrides must be explicit, verifiable, and tied to specific decisions and enforcement actions.

override_id.description: Unique identifier for this override authorization.

decision_id.description: The decision_id of the evaluation_budget_decision this override applies to.

summary_id.description: The summary_id of the evaluation_monitor_summary that drove the decision.

action_id.description: The action_id that the generated enforcement action must carry when this override is applied.

approved_by.description: Identity of the human approver who authorized this override.

justification.description: Human-readable justification for granting this override.

scope.description: Enforcement scope this override is authorized for.

allowed_actions.description: Action types that this override permits to proceed.

expires_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp after which this override is no longer valid.

created_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when this override authorization was created.
